prompt: Review a refactoring plan where extraction targets already exist

assertions.text: Identifies NlApprovalDialog and useNlSuggestions as already-extracted equivalents of the proposed SuggestionChips
Identifies that SSE/streaming lives in lib/api/query.ts, not in the component, and the proposed return signature is wrong
Identifies the subtle ref-based abort controller identity check pattern (streamAbortRef.current !== controller, not just signal.aborted)
Lists at least 3 of the 4 missing downstream files (NlWorkflowSteps, SqlRevealBlock, QueryPanel, stream test)
Notes the naming mismatch — 'chips' vs actual 'dropdown/dialog' UI pattern
Identifies the ApproveThemeClasses or NlPhase re-export chain from NlQueryReducer through NlQueryWorkflow to consumers
Proposes useNlGeneration hook as the correct extraction target with a concrete return signature
Verifies the actual line count (~367) and argues it's not actually large for an orchestrator
Specifically mentions NlQueryWorkflow.stream.test.tsx as an unmentioned file that would be affected
